name: Realyn End Table - Signature Design by Ashley: Cottage Style, Antiqued Two-Tone, Wood Finish
description: Elevating the art of traditional cottage styling, this round end table is sure to serve you beautifully for years to come. Antiqued two-tone aesthetic blends a chipped white with a distressed wood finished top for added charm. Classic cabriole legs and shapely lower shelf are a lovely twist. Decorative corbels add refinement. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
